description_long: This is a three-piece upholstered sofa set featuring a floral patterned fabric in soft pastel tones. The set includes a large three-seater sofa and two matching armchairs, all with rolled armrests and high, continuous backrests. The upholstery is adorned with a delicate botanical print, giving the ensemble a classic, vintage-inspired appearance. Each piece stands on four short, turned wooden legs with a dark finish, providing a subtle contrast to the light fabric. The seat and back cushions are plush and appear to be attached, maintaining a uniform and structured look. The overall design is inviting and comfortable, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A three-piece floral upholstered sofa set with rolled armrests, high backrests, and turned wooden legs. The set includes a large sofa and two matching armchairs, all featuring a classic botanical print.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full set: a large sofa and two armchairs, highlighting the floral upholstery and rolled armrests.
description_view_1: Rear and side view emphasizing the continuous backrest and the turned wooden legs of the sofa.
description_view_2: Back and angled view displaying the uniformity of the backrests and the arrangement of the legs.
description_view_3: Angled front view focusing on the seat depth, cushion arrangement, and the floral pattern across the seating surfaces.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Each piece has a single, continuous seat cushion and a single, continuous back cushion, both attached and uniform in size, with no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_armrest_style: Rolled armrests present on all pieces, extending slightly above seat height, with a rounded profile and fully upholstered in the same floral fabric.
attribute_leg_design: Each piece has four short, turned wooden legs with a dark finish, positioned at the corners and fully exposed.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous backrest with a straight profile, fully upholstered and matching the seat cushion in fabric and pattern, with no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery features a light-colored background with a delicate, all-over floral pattern in pink and green tones, giving a vintage, classic appearance; the fabric appears smooth and matte.
